versionMetadata.name: CLX - Campaign Router v2.0
versionMetadata.description: Intelligent campaign routing based on industry, signals, and product type. Takes "Signal Detected" leads, assigns campaign_name, campaign_type, campaign_value_proposition, campaign_pain_point, campaign_call_to_action, campaign_tone. Updates status to "Campaign Assigned". Runs every 15 minutes. Uses RPC update_lead with Prep+RPC pattern. v2.0 — April 2026.
